title: Operations Rail Console
concept: A responsive WordPress Playground console with a persistent left operations rail for Create, Save, Library, Manage, Blueprints, Data, Logs, and Transfer modes. Each mode updates the same active Playground identity, path, storage badge, saved rows, preview state, and transfer history.
flows: Start a Playground from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or ZIP import while retaining the live shell
Save the current temporary Playground to a local directory with folder permission, progress, selected folder identity, local storage badge, saved row mutation, and reload consequence
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open, rename, delete confirmation, row removal, and active-site fallback
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, files, Blueprint, database, and logs with file dirty/save state and reset versus reload copy
Browse a clearly labeled representative subset of the 43 Blueprint gallery entries with categories, search, URL validation, copy, download, and run result state
Finish a ZIP download transfer with source status, progress, generated archive result, preview mutation, and transfer history
featureCoverage: Featured Blueprint shortcuts in representative subset
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Delete saved Playground with confirmation and final state
Path input and refresh for active embedded WordPress page
Temporary, saved browser, and local-directory storage states
WordPress, PHP, language, older versions, network, and multisite settings
Destructive reset and saved/local reload consequences
File browser create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint editor copy, download, run, validation, and result state
SQLite database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with warning and error states
